title: Enhanced Premiere

'''''Enhanced Premiere''''' was a boutique product created and produced in [[November]] of [[1998]] for the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game]]. The package came with one new character card and several packs of [[Premiere Limited|Premiere]]. It was mainly used as a way for Decipher to get rid of excess product (the Premier packs) as well as create a new, easy to obtain, easy to use, (also basically a "must-have" due to its game-text and relevance to the game), and a good starting point for newer players.

Decipher would later produce two more "Enhanced" versions: [[Enhanced Cloud City]] (used to get rid of excess [[Cloud City Limited|Cloud City]] packs), and [[Enhanced Jabba's Palace]] (used to get rid of excess [[Jabba's Palace Limited|Jabba's Palace]] packs).

==Media==
===Card list===
Six new cards (one of the following per package):
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] with Lightsaber
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan]] with Lightsaber
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] with Lightsaber
*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] with Blaster
*[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] with Blaster Rifle
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] with Blaster Rifle
